title: Mega Man 9 - Galaxy Fantasy (Galaxy Man Stage) on Mario Paint Composer
description:
My efforts of all of today and yesterday are in front of your face. I wanted to save this for my 1-year Mario Paint Composer debut (Nov. 11) but I don't have the patience, plus a Tuesday isn't exactly the most popular day of the week, is it? So here is my early release of my 1-year anniversay of MARIO PAINT COMPOSER!

It's been a fun year full of some really precious memories. I would like to thank all of my friends and fans who have supported me all of this time, and all of the Mario Painters before and after me who inspire and continue to inspire me. I'm nowhere near done with making videos, so look foward to hopefully another year of Mario Paint a la Axelrod!

About the video:
This video is for my fans who keep asking, "Can you PLEASE do a song from Megaman?" despite the fact that I haven't played any of the games before (please don't throw things). I had listened to the Mega Man 9 soundtrack and was blown away by the quality of some of the songs. I had started this one, and it was coming well until a bug in the Arranger feature deleted my 2 hours of work (DO NOT SAVE AN ARRANGEMENT WITH THE SAME NAME AS ONE OF YOUR SONGS). So my friend Levus28 helped me get the motivation to start over and it came out really well in the end.A picture is worth a thousand words, and at 25 frames per second on a 1:39 minute video that's... a headache, so just watch and enjoy!

Day 1
#39 - Top Favorited (Today) - Gaming
#64 - Top Rated (Today) - Gaming
Thank you!
